subject.description: Woman, late 20s, mixed ethnicity, dark wavy hair loosely pulled back, wearing an oversized cream linen button-down shirt and dark wide-leg trousers. Sitting cross-legged on a modern light grey linen sofa. Laptop open beside her on the cushion but she is not touching it. Phone resting on the sofa armrest showing a green notification badge. Skin has natural texture, no makeup polish, individual fine hairs visible. Posture is loose and relaxed, not posed.
subject.action: Sitting cross-legged on the sofa, both hands resting lightly in her lap, gaze directed forward and slightly up — not at the screen, not at the phone. The expression: corners of lips very slightly lifted, not a smile, more a quiet knowing. Eyes soft, mid-distance focus. The look of someone whose work just finished itself.

setting.location: Modern minimal apartment living room with floor-to-ceiling glass windows. Outside: soft city rooftops or tree canopy, slightly out of focus. Interior is clean — white walls, light wood floors, a single pendant lamp off to the right unlit. The laptop screen behind her shoulder glows with a dashboard populating with data rows and a graph line building upward.
setting.time_of_day: Early morning, 7am. Soft diffused daylight pouring through the floor-to-ceiling glass. No harsh direct sun — overcast morning quality light, cool and clean.

composition.camera_angle: Eye-level, slightly to her left. She fills the left two-thirds of the frame. Laptop screen visible over her right shoulder in soft background bokeh.
composition.framing: Full medium shot. Crown of head with headspace at top. Frame cuts at hip level. Eyes land in upper third. Laptop screen softly visible behind her right shoulder — readable but blurred. Phone on armrest in lower right foreground, slightly out of focus showing green glow.

lighting.type: Soft diffused morning window light from the floor-to-ceiling glass on the right side of frame. Cool, clean, even. No harsh shadows. Gentle wrap light on her face and shirt.
lighting.color_grading: Cool morning tones with warm skin protection. Slightly desaturated background, natural skin warmth maintained. Clean and editorial — no teal-orange push. Feels like early morning before the city wakes up.

mood: Calm authority. The work ran itself overnight. She already knew it would. There is nothing urgent here — just the quiet confidence of someone who built something that runs without her.
aesthetic_style: 8K ultra realistic, hyper realistic photorealism. Shot on Canon EOS R5. Skin pores and individual hair strands visible. Feels like a still from a prestige documentary series about modern founders. Not a stock photo. Not posed for a camera. Caught in a real moment.
